summary: Comprehensive testing of BITZ Club login/dashboard flow after bug fixes. All critical issues resolved - admin login redirects to /admin, member login redirects to /member, all admin pages load correctly, member Family tab works without 403 error.

issues: Console warnings about chart dimensions (-1 width/height) - cosmetic issue, charts still render

context_for_next_testing_agent: All login/dashboard flows verified working. Previous issues (stale token causing infinite loading, Family 403 error) have been fixed. Test credentials: Admin 9999999999/admin123, Member 7812901115/test123 (Raj, member_id: 2607600015).
